entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0004.9288] Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Investing Activities with a value of -513,565 is not equal to the combined total of None and None ( -524,008 + -10,443 ) with a value of -534,451.
These values should be equal. The properties of this us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInInvestingActivities fact are: Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-06-30 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Investing Activities : 0 Decimals of None : 0 Decimals of None : 0
Rule Element Id:9288 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SBET_instance_2023_2025.xml 5793

property.name: label
property.value: Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Investing Activities
